name: Ambiguous Button Reference Across Pages
prompt: Change the button to link to /booking instead of where it goes now.

setup.content:
---
title: "About"
description: "Learn about our bakery"
pageLayout: "full"
---
<Hero
  heading="Our Story"
  subheading="Family-owned since 1998."
  actions={[
    { label: "Get Started", href: "/contact", variant: "primary" }
  ]}
/>

<Article
  heading="Meet the Team"
  paragraphs={["We are a small team passionate about great bread."]}
/>

dry_run.text: Sam points out that both the homepage and the About page have a 'Get Started' button linking to /contact, and asks which page's button (or both) should be updated to /booking before making any change.
